decisions: Decided to adopt PostgreSQL logical replication for analytics feed

Decided to keep GraphQL gateway but split read models
Decided to postpone full multi-region failover to phase two
Decided to enforce zero-downtime migrations via expand-contract pattern
Decided to standardize on OpenTelemetry for tracing
